name: claude-skills
description: A curated collection of 13 production-ready Claude skills with 127 commands for email, writing, decision-making, learning, planning, creativity, career, social media, meetings, business, and utilities.
author: onesmartmoney

email-messages.description: Transforms and optimizes email communication. Converts bullet points to professional emails, changes tone, crafts difficult messages respectfully.

write-edit.description: Polishes your texts to perfection. Fixes typos, generates alternatives, simplifies language, strengthens passive constructions.

think-decide.description: Supports you with difficult decisions through structured analysis. Weighs options, reveals hidden risks, asks skeptic questions.

learn-understand.description: Explains complex concepts understandably and imparts new knowledge in a structured way. Crash courses, myth-busting, comparisons.

plan-organize.description: Structures your time and tasks systematically. Creates weekly plans, milestones, schedules, routines and checklists.

brainstorm.description: Generates creative ideas and solutions from many perspectives. Idea lists, alternative approaches, combining concepts.

work-career.description: Supports your professional development and communication. Interview prep, resume bullets, salary negotiations.

content-social.description: Optimizes content for social media and digital platforms. Hook lines, captions, threads, carousels, CTAs.

meetings-notes.description: Converts meeting chaos into clear documentation. Cleans notes into minutes, extracts action items, creates status updates.

small-business.description: Workflows for small businesses. Creates invoices, customer emails, contracts, proposals, payment reminders and business strategies.

pdf-reader-skill.description: Reads and processes PDF documents reliably. Extracts text and tables, summarizes, highlights sections and recognizes scanned pages (OCR-hint).

video-lesen.description: Reads and analyzes video files and video URLs. Fetches transcripts, frames and metadata. YouTube, Vimeo, local videos (.mp4, .mkv, etc).

summarize-changes.description: Summarizes uncommitted changes in git repository. Flags risky changes, missing error handling, hardcoded values.
